================================================================================
NT Q&A APPLICATION - QUICK START GUIDE
================================================================================

LAUNCHING THE APP
-----------------
1. Double-click the desktop shortcut "NT Q&A App"
   OR
   Search "NT Q&A App" in Start Menu and click it

The app will open in your default web browser at http://localhost:3000

If the browser doesn't open automatically:
- Open your web browser
- Go to http://localhost:3000

EXPLORING THE APP
-----------------

SEARCH TAB
• Type a word or phrase in the search box
• Click "Search" to find matching questions and answers
• Results show the book name, question, and answer
• Click "Add" on any result to select it

BROWSE BOOKS TAB
• Select a book from the dropdown
• View all Q&A pairs for that book
• Use the chapter filter to view specific chapters
• Click "Add" to select questions

RANDOM Q&A TAB
• Click "Get Random Question" to display a random question
• Great for testing your knowledge
• Click "Add" to add it to your selection

EXPORT TAB
• Shows your current selections
• "Export All" downloads all 27 books to a text file
• "Export Selected" downloads only your selected items
• "Generate Summary" creates summaries of your selections

ADDING ITEMS TO SELECTION
--------------------------
1. Click the "➕ Add" button on any question
2. The button will change to "✓ Added"
3. A selection banner appears at the top showing count
4. Selected items stay selected as you browse
5. View all selections in the Export tab
6. Click "Clear" to remove all selections
7. Click again on an added item to deselect it

GENERATING SUMMARIES
---------------------

SIMPLE SUMMARY (Free)
1. Select some Q&A items (click "Add")
2. Go to Export tab
3. Select "Simple Summary"
4. Click "Generate Summary"
5. Wait for processing
6. Copy or download the summary

AI SUMMARY (Requires API Key)
1. Get an OpenAI API key from https://platform.openai.com
2. Go to Export tab
3. Select "AI Summary"
4. Paste your API key in the text field
5. Select items and click "Generate Summary"
6. The AI will create an intelligent summary
7. Copy or download the result

TIPS & TRICKS
-------------

• Bookmark: Add http://localhost:3000 to your bookmarks
• Keyboard Shortcut: Press Ctrl+K in your browser for quick search
• Export Format: Exported files are plain text (can open with any editor)
• Large Exports: For exporting all books, allow a few seconds for download

WHEN YOU'RE DONE
----------------

To stop the app:
1. Close the browser tab
2. The app continues running in background
3. To fully stop, find the console window and press Ctrl+C
   OR close the NT-QA-App.bat window if it's open

STARTING AGAIN
--------------
Just double-click the desktop shortcut again - the app restarts automatically

SETTINGS & PREFERENCES
----------------------

Your preferences are saved in:
C:\Users\<YourUsername>\.nt-qa-app\setup_config.json

You can manually edit this file to change:
- Port number (if needed for conflicts)
- Theme preference (light/dark)
- Other settings

After editing, restart the app for changes to take effect

TROUBLESHOOTING
---------------

Q: I don't see the browser open
A: The app is still running. Manually go to http://localhost:3000

Q: Search isn't working
A: Try simpler search terms, no special characters
   Searches are case-insensitive

Q: Can I change the port?
A: Yes, edit the config file:
   C:\Users\<YourUsername>\.nt-qa-app\setup_config.json
   Change "app_port" to another number (1024-65535)
   Restart the app

Q: How do I update the app?
A: Download the latest version and run setup wizard again
   Your configuration will be preserved

Q: Can I use this on multiple computers?
A: Yes! Use the flash drive or copy the folder to other computers
   Run NT-QA-Setup.bat on each computer

Q: How do I uninstall?
A: Simply delete the NT-QA-App folder and shortcuts
   Your settings are saved separately and won't affect anything else

MORE FEATURES
-------------

• Keyboard navigation: Tab to move between fields
• Multiple selections: Select as many items as you want before exporting
• Large content: Scroll within the Q&A cards to see full text
• Copy to clipboard: Available in summary view

NEED HELP?
----------

Check these files for more information:
- README.txt - Detailed setup and troubleshooting
- INSTALLATION.md - System requirements and setup guide
- Project documentation - Full feature reference

================================================================================
Happy learning with NT Q&A!
================================================================================
